name: ivy-context-memory
description: Local ACCA context and memory sidecar for Codex, OpenCode, and other coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Query an external ACCA memory store before agent work.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local memory/context sidecar that ingests repos, docs, and safe notes into ACCA-shaped evidence, then returns small audited context packets for Codex, OpenCode, or any OpenAI-compatible coding agent.
defaultPrompt: Query IVY memory for this task.
Ingest this repo into IVY memory.
